name: Herbed Macaroni Parmesan
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Minced fresh Basil (2 teaspoons dried)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to boil. Cook the pasta until al dente.
2. Drain the pasta well.
3. Toss the hot noodles with melted margarine.
4. Add the remaining ingredients and toss to combine.
5. Garnish with broccoli florets, if desired.
Variations:
- Add sauteed mushroom slices or your choice of steamed vegetables.
